verses.1: Make a joyful shout to God, all the earth!
verses.2: Sing to the glory of his name!
verses.3: Tell God, “How awesome are your deeds!
verses.4: All the earth will worship you,
verses.6: He turned the sea into dry land.
verses.7: He rules by his might forever.
verses.9: who preserves our life among the living,
verses.10: For you, God, have tested us.
verses.12: You allowed men to ride over our heads.
verses.13: I will come into your temple with burnt offerings.
verses.15: I will offer to you burnt offerings of fat animals,
verses.16: Come and hear, all you who fear God.
verses.17: I cried to him with my mouth.
verses.18: If I cherished sin in my heart,
verses.19: But most certainly, God has listened.
verses.20: Blessed be God, who has not turned away my prayer,
